parameters.body:
={
  "business_id": {{ JSON.stringify($json.biz.id) }},
  "instagram_caption": {{ JSON.stringify($json.instagram_caption || '') }},

parameters.subject: ={{ "Your week of content is ready, " + ($('Loop Each Business').first().json.first_name || $('Loop Each Business').first().json.business_name) + "!" }}
parameters.message:
=

Your Weekly Content is Ready!

Hi {{ $('Loop Each Business').first().json.first_name || $('Loop Each Business').first().json.business_name }},

We have generated a full week of high-performance marketing content for {{ $('Loop Each Business').first().json.business_name }}. Here is a preview:

Instagram Caption

{{ $('Merge Results').first().json.instagram_caption || 'Content generated successfully' }}

Email Subject

{{ $('Merge Results').first().json.email_subject || 'Email ready' }}

Your Performance Stats

  • Total Reach: {{ $input.first().json[0]?.total_reach || 0 }} people
  • Weekly Reach: {{ $input.first().json[0]?.weekly_reach || 0 }} people
  • Weekly Leads: {{ $input.first().json[0]?.weekly_leads || 0 }}
  • Average ROAS: {{ $input.first().json[0]?.avg_roas || 'N/A' }}
  • Posts Published: {{ $input.first().json[0]?.posts_published || 0 }}
Review and Approve Content

This content was generated by maroa.ai and is pending your approval before publishing.

parameters.url: ={{ "https://maroa-api-production.up.railway.app/api/context/" + String($json.userId || $json.business_id || $json.user_id || $json.id || ($json.biz && $json.biz.id) || $('Loop Each Business').first().json.id || $('Loop Each Business').first().json.user_id || $('Split In Batches').first().json.id || $('Split In Batches').first().json.user_id || $vars.userId || "") }}
